scripts.release:check: npm run check:copy && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run e2e
scripts.verify: npm run check:copy && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.deploy:preview: vercel pull --yes --environment=preview && vercel build && vercel deploy --prebuilt
scripts.deploy:production: vercel pull --yes --environment=production && vercel build --prod && vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
